conclusion: YOLO11s-seg outperforms UNet-ResNet34 overall on pixel-wise IoU (0.444 vs 0.345), particularly on the Animal class where UNet suffered from severe pixel-level class imbalance (Animal = 0.07% of total pixels). UNet slightly outperformed YOLO on Waste, likely due to Waste having larger, denser pixel coverage well-suited to per-pixel classification.
